message: [review-fix] test(fnp-python): exercise native ptp conformance path

files.patch:
@@ -3,8 +3,42 @@
 //! Tests the native Rust ptp implementation against NumPy across various
 //! input shapes, axis parameters, and data types.
 
+mod common;
+
+use common::{CompareMode, RequirementLevel, Totals, run_case, with_fnp_and_numpy};
+use pyo3::prelude::*;
+use pyo3::types::{PyDict, PyTuple};
 use std::process::Command;
 
+fn no_kwargs<'py>(_py: Python<'py>) -> PyResult<Option<pyo3::Bound<'py, PyDict>>> {
+    Ok(None)
+}
+
+fn np_array_1d_f<'py>(
+    py: Python<'py>,
+    values: Vec<f64>,
+) -> PyResult<pyo3::Bound<'py, pyo3::types::PyAny>> {
+    py.import("numpy")?.getattr("array")?.call1((values,))
+}
+
+fn np_array_2d_f<'py>(
+    py: Python<'py>,
+    values: Vec<Vec<f64>>,
+) -> PyResult<pyo3::Bound<'py, pyo3::types::PyAny>> {
+    py.import("numpy")?.getattr("array")?.call1((values,))
+}
+
+fn np_array_1d_u8<'py>(
+    py: Python<'py>,
+    values: Vec<i64>,
+) -> PyResult<pyo3::Bound<'py, pyo3::types::PyAny>> {
+    let kwargs = PyDict::new(py);
+    kwargs.set_item("dtype", py.import("numpy")?.getattr("uint8")?)?;
+    py.import("numpy")?
+        .getattr("array")?
+        .call((values,), Some(&kwargs))
+}
+
 fn numpy_oracle(script: &str) -> String {
     let output = Command::new("python3")
         .args(["-c", script])
@@ -49,6 +83,107 @@ fn arrays_close(a: &[f64], b: &[f64], tol: f64) -> bool {
         .all(|(x, y)| floats_close(*x, *y, tol))
 }
 
+#[test]
+fn ptp_native_fnp_python_path_matches_numpy() {
+    static TOTALS: Totals = Totals::new();
+
+    with_fnp_and_numpy(|py, module, numpy| {
+        let t = &TOTALS;
+
+        run_case(
+            py,
+            &module,
+            &numpy,
+            "ptp-native-flat-scalar",
+            "ptp",
+            RequirementLevel::Must,
+            CompareMode::Surface,
+            t,
+            |py| PyTuple::new(py, [np_array_1d_f(py, vec![1.0, -2.0, 5.0, 3.0])?]),
+            no_kwargs,
+        );
+
+        run_case(
+            py,
+            &module,
+            &numpy,
+            "ptp-native-axis-0",
+            "ptp",
+            RequirementLevel::Must,
+            CompareMode::Close,
+            t,
+            |py| {
+                PyTuple::new(
+                    py,
+                    [np_array_2d_f(
+                        py,
+                        vec![vec![1.0, 5.0, -1.0], vec![4.0, 2.0, 3.0]],
+                    )?],
+                )
+            },
+            |py| {
+                let kwargs = PyDict::new(py);
+                kwargs.set_item("axis", 0_i64)?;
+                Ok(Some(kwargs))
+            },
+        );
+
+        run_case(
+            py,
+            &module,
+            &numpy,
+            "ptp-native-negative-axis",
+            "ptp",
+            RequirementLevel::Must,
+            CompareMode::Close,
+            t,
+            |py| {
+                PyTuple::new(
+                    py,
+                    [np_array_2d_f(
+                        py,
+                        vec![vec![1.0, 5.0, -1.0], vec![4.0, 2.0, 3.0]],
+                    )?],
+                )
+            },
+            |py| {
+                let kwargs = PyDict::new(py);
+                kwargs.set_item("axis", -1_i64)?;
+                Ok(Some(kwargs))
+            },
+        );
+
+        run_case(
+            py,
+            &module,
+            &numpy,
+            "ptp-native-nan-propagates",
+            "ptp",
+            RequirementLevel::Should,
+            CompareMode::Surface,
+            t,
+            |py| PyTuple::new(py, [np_array_1d_f(py, vec![1.0, f64::NAN, 3.0])?]),
+            no_kwargs,
+        );
+
+        run_case(
+            py,
+            &module,
+            &numpy,
+            "ptp-native-uint8-dtype",
+            "ptp",
+            RequirementLevel::Should,
+            CompareMode::Strict,
+            t,
+            |py| PyTuple::new(py, [np_array_1d_u8(py, vec![255, 0, 128])?]),
+            no_kwargs,
+        );
+
+        eprintln!("{}", TOTALS.summarize("ptp-native"));
+        Ok(())
+    });
+}
+
 #[test]
 fn ptp_flat_reduction_matches_numpy_across_50_cases() {
     let test_cases = vec![
